options.name: --env
options.description:
Path to an environment file. Can be more than one file
specified. The path can be absolute or relative against a
current directory

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Normal) Verbosity level. Can be one of: detail,
normal or min

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description:
(Default: dbup.yml) Path to a configuration file. The path
can be absolute or relative against a current directory
